zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Kaye於1510年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯時，她的父親Sir Arthur Kaye21歲，母親Biatryx Wentworth16歲。她於大約1530年與John Edward Lawrence在英國賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1572年在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Kaye于1510年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯时，她的父亲Sir Arthur Kaye21岁，母亲Biatryx Wentworth16岁。她于大约1530年与John Edward Lawrence在英国賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1572年在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Kaye was born in 1510, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Arthur Kaye, was 21 and her mother, Biatryx Wentworth, was 16. She married John Edward Lawrence about 1530, in Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1572, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Kaye est née en 1510, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Arthur Kaye, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Biatryx Wentworth, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Edward Lawrence environ 1530, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1572, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Kayeが1510年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで生まれた時，父Sir Arthur Kayeは21歳，母Biatryx Wentworthは16歳であった。約1530年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでJohn Edward Lawrenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1572年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Kaye(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Arthur Kaye(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Biatryx Wentworth(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1530년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 John Edward Lawrence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1572년 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Kaye родилась в 1510 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Arthur Kaye было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Biatryx Wentworth, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Edward Lawrence около 1530 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1572 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.
